94.reason: [错误：zhishu是整数，不能与字符'\n'比较。输入读取时没有读取换行符，导致循环条件永远为真，造成无限循环。应改为检测输入结束，例如使用scanf返回值或读取换行符。]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.5 , reason:  [错误：zhishu是整数，不能与字符'\n'比较。输入读取时没有读取换行符，导致循环条件永远为真，造成无限循环。应改为检测输入结束，例如使用scanf返回值或读取换行符。]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  [错误：zhishu是整数，不能与字符'\n'比较。输入读取时没有读取换行符，导致循环条件永远为真，造成无限循环。应改为检查scanf返回值或读取换行符。]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  错误：zhishu是整数，不能与字符'\n'比较，且scanf不会读取换行符，应使用scanf返回值或读取换行符来判断输入结束
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.14285714285714285 , reason:  Incorrect loop condition; comparing integer to newline character, will never terminate correctly.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.2 , reason:  Comparing integer exponent to '\n' is logically incorrect; should check the character read by scanf
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  zhishu is an integer storing the exponent, comparing it to '\n' (ASCII 10) does not detect the newline. Additionally, scanf("%d %d") automatically skips whitespace including newlines, so this condition will never correctly identify the end of the line, causing an infinite loop or premature termination if the exponent happens to be 10.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [The loop condition is incorrect: zhishu is an integer read from input and will never equal '\n' (which is 10). This causes infinite loop or undefined behavior. The program should check for newline differently, e.g., by inspecting the next character in input buffer.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [The loop condition is incorrect: 'zhishu' is an integer read from input and will never equal the character '\n' (ASCII 10). This causes infinite loop or undefined behavior. The input reading does not check for newline properly.]
